pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 41 creates the file at this path using odf.opendocument.OpenDocumentPresentation()
setup_task.sh lines 48-59 creates the JSON snippet file at this path
task.json description line 3 explicitly states: 'Set the slide title to: "API Response Structure"'
JSON snippet in setup_task.sh line 50 contains the key 'user_id'
JSON snippet in setup_task.sh line 50 contains the value 'usr_8742_x9' assigned to the user_id key
JSON snippet in setup_task.sh line 54 contains 'sysadmin' as a value in the roles array

Liberation Mono is a real monospaced font sponsored by Red Hat, metrically compatible with Courier New (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Liberation_fonts). Verified as a legitimate monospaced font choice.

Courier New is a real monospaced font from Microsoft, widely available on systems (https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/typography/font-list/courier-new). Verified as a legitimate monospaced font choice.

Consolas is a real monospaced font designed by Lucas de Groot for Microsoft, included since Windows Vista (https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/typography/font-list/consolas). Verified as a legitimate monospaced font choice.
Courier is a real monospaced font designed in 1955 for IBM (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Courier_(typeface)). Found on system as 'Courier 10 Pitch'. Verified as a legitimate monospaced font choice.

Monospace is a generic font family in CSS and font systems (https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/Reference/Values/generic-family). It is used as a fallback that matches any monospaced font on the system. Verified as a legitimate generic family name.
DejaVu Sans Mono is a real monospaced font found on the system at /usr/share/fonts/dejavu-sans-mono-fonts/. Verified as an installed and legitimate monospaced font choice.

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a synthetic LibreOffice Impress presentation at /home/ga/Documents/Presentations/api_docs_v2.odp with 2 initial slides. A JSON snippet file containing user credentials (user_id: usr_8742_x9, roles including sysadmin) is created at /home/ga/Desktop/json_snippet.txt. The task requires adding a third slide titled 'API Response Structure', pasting the JSON content into a code block with monospace font (Liberation Mono, Courier New, Consolas, Courier, Monospace, or DejaVu Sans Mono), light gray background (#EEEEEE or similar), and a visible black border. The verifier checks for these specific formatting requirements and expects the presentation file to be modified during task execution. All metadata claims about file paths, titles, and expected strings match the actual setup configuration.
